sprint.name: Captain Planning Dashboard — Big-Picture Week Planning
sprint.goal: Give captains a larger-screen planning surface that unifies availability, 'My Tennis' preferences, and captain-only private notes across the whole club, with effortless week-by-week scrubbing and a draft-lineup flow that hands off to the existing selection workflow
focus_areas: Unified 'whole club' planning view with scope filters (My Teams / My Division / Team / All)
Week scrubbing with availability + preferences roll-up
Flow from planning draft into the existing selection workflow
dependencies: Sprint 016 WI-094 (schema: user.player_id FK, player_tennis_preferences, captain_player_notes)
